description.unified: Deals Magic DMG to a random enemy 5times. Each hit stuns the target for [1sec->0.5sec], and restores Mana by 100 when landing a Critical Hit. Non-hero enemies take additional Magic DMG equal to 7% of ATK per [Ember] stack.
Deals Magic DMG to enemies in the target area and stuns them for [2sec->1sec]. Non-hero enemies take additional Magic DMG equal to 40% of ATK per [Ember] stack. [(removed) Inflicts 12 Ember stacks]
Deals Magic DMG to all enemies 5times. This attack applies [150%->160%] increased Critical DMG, and non-hero enemies take additional Magic DMG equal to 10% of ATK per [Ember] stack.

On hit, applies a stack of [Ember] to the target. When attacking a target at max stacks, restores Mana by 30. [Ember]: Deals Magic Damage over Time every 1sec for 20sec, and stacks up to [12->10] times.

dark.unified: Mana cost increases by 1000, but damage increases by 100%.

light.unified: When hitting an enemy with 10 or more [Ember] stacks, Magic DMG taken increases by [40%->20%] for [10 sec->5 sec].

dark.unified: When there are 5 or more enemies, Mana cost is reduced by 2000 for 10 sec. This effect can only trigger once every 10 sec.

light.unified: Each [Ember] stack increases the target’s Magic DMG taken by 1%.

dark.unified: Every 10 sec, stuns enemies with [Ember] for [2 sec->1 sec]. If the target has 10 or more [Ember] stacks, stuns for [3 sec->1.5 sec] instead.

description.unified: [Fire Ball] Reduces Mana Cost by 1 and increases DMG by {0}%.

[Fire Rain] Increases DMG by 20%. Upon Critical Hit on an enemy with 5 or more stacks of Ember, Cooldown will be reduced by 5%. Upon killing an enemy with this Skill, Cooldown will be reduced by an additional 20%.

dark.unified: [Ember] becomes non-dispellable, and applies [2 stacks->1 stack] every second to all non-hero enemies. [(removed) increases M.DMG target takes if they have 10 stacks]

description.unified: Critical Rate increases by {0}, Critial DMG increase by {1}, and Skill Attacks deal additional Magic DMG equal to [{1}->{2}]% of ATK per [Ember] stack on the target. [(removed) Increases ATK Spd by {0}]
